mapper.sql: select ai_gen_member_expire_at as aiGenMemberExpireAt, avatar as avatar, baidu_uk as baiduUk, create_time as createTime, delete_time as deleteTime, id as id, image_split_member_expire_at as imageSplitMemberExpireAt, material_member_expire_at as materialMemberExpireAt, mobile as mobile, nickname as nickname, password as password, plugin_member_expire_at as pluginMemberExpireAt, roles as roles, salt as salt, update_time as updateTime, username as username, uuid as uuid, vip_level as vipLevel from users
